mapper.select: SELECT er.id AS 'id', er.yonghu_id AS 'yonghuId', er.homeworkrecord_uuid_number AS 'homeworkrecord_uuid_number', ep.homework_name AS 'homework_name', er.total_score AS 'total_score', RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY er.homework_id ORDER BY er.total_score DESC) AS 'rank' FROM homeworkrecord er JOIN homework ep ON er.homework_id = ep.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND (er.yonghu_id = #{yonghu_id} OR #{yonghu_id} IS NULL) ORDER BY er.homework_id, er.total_score DESC
mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.homeworkrecord_uuid_number as homeworkrecordUuidNumber ,a.yonghu_id as yonghuId ,a.homework_id as homeworkId ,a.total_score as totalScore ,a.insert_time as insertTime ,a.create_time as createTime
